strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Proven track record in scaling engineering practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE Capital)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks (re:cinq)
concerns: Limited visible experience with fintech-specific systems (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, or embedded finance)
No demonstrated leadership in scaling teams beyond 10-15 people or managing external delivery partners
Minimal exposure to regulated environments with financial or operational consequences
response.justification: Bogdan’s resume highlights strong distributed-systems expertise and recent AI-agent infrastructure work, aligning with core technical requirements. However, his background lacks direct fintech experience (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance) and demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or managing hybrid delivery models. The positive signal from AI-agent work is offset by these gaps in domain-specific leadership and fintech integration.
